Your talent.
Their living room.
Everyone wins.

Book intimate live performances. Split the door. Build your scene. The Airbnb for house shows is here.

Venue Radar

Goes to the Artist

Platform Fee on Bookings
For Musicians

Play intimate shows. Keep the money.

  • →Build a profile with your Spotify, YouTube & SoundCloud
  • →Set your rate and availability
  • →Get booked by hosts in your area
  • →Sell tickets directly — 70% of every door goes to you
  • →100-mile venue radar shows every opportunity nearby
Create Artist Profile
For Hosts

Turn your space into a venue.

  • →List your home, backyard, or small venue
  • →Browse artists by genre, price, and availability
  • →Handle tickets and RSVPs in one place
  • →Keep 30% of every ticket sold at your show
  • →Build a reputation as the best house show host in town
List Your Space
The Flow

From profile to payout in 5 steps

01

Build your profile

Musicians link Spotify, YouTube, and SoundCloud. Hosts list their space with photos and capacity.

02

Get matched

Artists browse the 100-mile venue radar. Hosts browse available artists by genre and price.

03

Book the show

Send a booking request. Both parties confirm the date, rate, and ticket price.

04

Sell tickets

HouseShow handles the ticketing page. Both parties promote to their audiences.

05

Get paid

Show ends. Stripe splits automatically: 70% artist, 30% host, 10% platform. Instant payouts.

HouseShowhouseshow.net · Live music for real people
